case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. SWISS PORT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SWISS PORT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT SWISS PORT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWISS PORT $6,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,029.10 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,899.40, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
